overview: BiyoFlow connects households in Hargeisa, Somaliland with water tanker delivery drivers. Drivers register, pay a $1/shift fee via simulated ZAAD payment, receive a Z-number confirmation code, and activate their shift. Homeowners find nearby available trucks using GPS and zone matching, place orders, and both sides confirm delivery.
features: Driver registration and shift-fee activation via Z-number verification
Simulated ZAAD payment flow for $1/shift fee
Zone-based driver matching with browser geolocation and distance display
USSD-style customer ordering flow (zone, size, phone, payment)
Dual delivery confirmation by both driver and homeowner
10 Hargeisa zones with 24 seeded Somali drivers
